hero.title: Professional training for healthier, stronger teams
hero.subtitle: At CECAE, we design training solutions that strengthen organizational development, psychosocial wellbeing, mental health, and professional competencies for companies and institutions.

about.title: A professional ally for organizational development
about.body:
At Centro de Capacitación Empresarial (CECAE), we support the integral development of organizations through high-quality training processes. We identify each company's specific needs to design relevant interventions that strengthen human capital and improve the workplace environment.

We promote a healthy, ethical, and sustainable organizational culture based on respect, effective communication, and psychological wellbeing.

services.title: Programs designed for your team's real needs

items.title: Psychosocial Wellbeing and Mental Health
items.description: Interventions focused on preventing psychosocial risks, managing workplace stress, and promoting mental health in the work environment.

items.title: NOM-035-STPS-2018 Analysis
items.description: Evaluation and intervention in psychosocial risk factors, complying with current Mexican regulations through organizational diagnostics and improvement strategies.

items.title: Organizational Climate
items.description: Diagnosis and strengthening of the work environment, encouraging healthy interpersonal relationships and a positive organizational culture.

items.title: Leadership and Management
items.description: Development of management skills for effective team leadership, decision-making, and strategic human resources management.

items.title: Communication and Conflict Resolution Skills
items.description: Training focused on improving interpersonal communication, assertiveness, and appropriate conflict management within the organization.

nom.title: Diagnostics, intervention, and improvement aligned with the regulation
nom.body: NOM-035-STPS-2018 seeks to identify, analyze, and prevent psychosocial risk factors in workplaces. CECAE supports companies and institutions with evaluations, interventions, and improvement strategies aligned with current Mexican regulations.

method.title: A clear process to turn needs into sustainable results

steps.title: Implementation
steps.description: Delivery of dynamic and participatory workshops.

steps.title: Follow-up
steps.description: Ongoing support to ensure sustained improvement.

events.title: Upcoming events
events.intro: Training sessions, webinars, and talks for companies and institutions.
events.detailStub: The detail route is ready for version V2. Once events are published, this space will show full information and registration options.

items.question: Are trainings in-person or virtual?
items.answer: We can work in person, virtually, or in a hybrid format depending on your organization's needs and location.

items.question: Does CECAE work with companies of any size?
items.answer: Yes. We adapt interventions for companies, institutions, schools, nonprofits, and teams of different sizes.

items.question: Do you provide certificates or documentation?
items.answer: Yes, participation documentation can be provided. The final certificate format will be confirmed with CECAE before launch.

items.question: Can you adapt training to my organization's needs?
items.answer: Yes. The process begins with a diagnostic to design relevant and personalized programs.

items.question: How can I request more information?
items.answer: You can contact us via WhatsApp, phone, email, or complete the form to prepare your message.

items.question: What is NOM-035-STPS-2018?
items.answer: It is a Mexican standard focused on identifying, analyzing, and preventing psychosocial risk factors in workplaces.

contact.title: Request information about our training programs
contact.subtitle: Share your details and we will prepare a WhatsApp message with your organization's information.

form.turnstileRequired: Complete the security verification to continue.

privacy.title: Privacy notice
privacy.intro: This notice describes how contact personal data collected through the CECAE website is processed.

sections.title: Data collected
sections.body: We may request name, organization, phone, email, city, service of interest, and the message voluntarily submitted by the user.

sections.title: Purpose
sections.body: Data is used to answer information requests, coordinate consultations, and follow up on professional training services.

sections.title: Controller and ARCO rights
sections.body: CECAE is responsible for processing personal data. Access, rectification, cancellation, or opposition requests can be sent to capacitacion@cecae.org.

sections.title: Legal review
sections.body: The final text must be validated by a legal professional before being published as the definitive notice.

footer.summary: Business training for NOM-035 compliance and talent development.
